presets.name: Petri Dish
presets.desc: A small bowl, gentle prey. The starter aquarium.

presets.name: Hunter Ground
presets.desc: Mid-sized arena with a hostile pack.

presets.name: Underdog
presets.desc: You start small. Many giants. Grow or die.

presets.name: Twin Stars
presets.desc: Two gravity wells. Slingshot between them.

presets.name: Survival 60s
presets.desc: Stay alive for 60 seconds amid escalating threats.

presets.name: Pacifist Garden
presets.desc: Grow without harm — only neutrals around. Become the largest cell.

presets.name: Gladiator
presets.desc: A confined arena with a single big rival. May the larger absorb.

presets.name: Pacify the Field
presets.desc: Eliminate every cell that thinks. Drifters and field motes can stay.

presets.name: Binary Whirl
presets.desc: Two co-orbiting wells. Read the figure-eight, find the food.
